/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o LydbolgeLab_artefacts/Debug/VST3/Lydbolge-Lab.vst3/Contents/MacOS/Lydbolge-Lab "CMakeFiles/LydbolgeLab_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/LydbolgeLab_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_ARA.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/LydbolgeLab_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Standalone.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/LydbolgeLab_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Unity.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/LydbolgeLab_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/LydbolgeLab_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AU_1.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/LydbolgeLab_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AU_2.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/LydbolgeLab_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AUv3.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/LydbolgeLab_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_LV2.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/LydbolgeLab_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST2.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/LydbolgeLab_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST3.mm.o"  LydbolgeLab_artefacts/Debug/libLydbolge-Lab_SharedCode.a -framework CoreAudioKit -framework DiscRecording -framework WebKit -weak_framework Metal -weak_framework MetalKit -framework QuartzCore -framework CoreAudio -framework CoreMIDI -framework AudioToolbox -framework Cocoa -framework Foundation -framework IOKit -framework Security -framework Accelerate
